reasoning: Host-nation heads of state almost always attend the FIFA World Cup final (e.g., Qatar 2022, Russia 2018, Brazil 2014, France 1998). Donald Trump has demonstrated a very high level of personal involvement in the 2026 tournament: he established a White House task force for it, attended the final draw in December 2025 (where FIFA President Gianni Infantino gave him a ceremonial "Row 1, Seat 1" ticket for the final), and attended the FIFA Club World Cup Final in July 2025. The 2026 final will be held at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey in mid-July. This aligns perfectly with Trump's habitual summer residence at his Bedminster golf club, which is very close to the stadium. Overall, barring unexpected health issues or major crises, his attendance is highly probable. I set the probability significantly above the early April market of 0.60 because his explicit prior appearances at the Club World Cup and World Cup draw act as strong leading indicators.
